item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
• Redesigned interface with a dedicated settings window 🎨 ⚙️
  • Auto-update support via Sparkle 🔄 ✨
  • Add full Tags support: view, edit, search, and filter 🏷️
  • Display next upcoming reminder title in the menu bar 📌
  • Drag to resize the popup window ↕️ ↔️
  • Search across all reminders 🔍
  • Copy reminder option with configurable fields 📋
  • Add option to hide menu bar icon when counter is shown 🙈
  • New "Recent Reminders" section ⏪
  • Filter list menu stays open for multiple selections 🗂️
  • Edit and set recurrence rules for reminders 🔁
  • Animation when marking a reminder as completed ✨
  • Support 12-hour / 24-hour time format 🕐
  • Add advanced sorting options 🔃
  • Fix upcoming reminders with "all" option showing undated items 🐛
  • Fix reduce transparency option 🐛
  • Add translation for Filipino 🇵🇭 🌐
  • Add missing translations and other minor improvements in code ⚡

Details
